name: Tibet Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Tibet Development Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of beer under the Lhasa brand in China. It offers fresh beer, draft beer, beverage, pure water, liquor, and other alcoholic drinks. The company is also involved in the development and sale of computer software and hardware. The company was formerly known as Tibet Galaxy Science & Technology Development Co., Ltd. Tibet Development Co., Ltd. is based in Lhasa, China.
